text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy for the day. Regular exercise, even a 30-minute walk, strengthens your body and improves your mood. Sleep is equally important; aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your brain recharge. Don’t forget mental health—manage stress with hobbies or relaxation techniques. Finally, maintain a good work-life balance by setting boundaries between your job and personal time. Small, consistent changes in these areas can lead to a happier, healthier life.
